category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a vulnerability scanner using the OSV database; official GitHub README describes OSV-Scanner as a vulnerability scanner using OSV.dev data.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is osv-scanner; official GitHub README and documentation use OSV-Scanner.
docs_sources: official GitHub README points users to detailed documentation at google.github.io/osv-scanner; official docs include usage pages.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/google/osv-scanner, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GitHub README identify vulnerability scanning against OSV.dev data; official README documents source, image, and lockfile/package scanning.
